news.title: Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing
news.description: The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.

news.title: OpenAI abandons yet another side quest: ChatGPT’s erotic mode
news.description: It's only the latest of several side projects that the AI startup has ditched over the past week.

news.title: ByteDance’s new AI video generation model, Dreamina Seedance 2.0, comes to CapCut
news.description: The new model in CapCut will have built-in protections for making video from real faces or unauthorized intellectual property.

news.title: Conntour raises $7M from General Catalyst, YC to build an AI search engine for security video systems
news.description: Conntour uses AI models to let security teams query camera feeds using natural language to find any object, person, or situation.

news.title: Campaigners welcome Meta and YouTube's defeat in landmark social media addiction trial
news.description: A woman has been awarded $6m in a verdict that could have implications for hundreds of other cases in the US.

news.title: Meet the Tech Reporters Using AI to Help Write and Edit Their Stories
news.description: Independent writers are using AI agents all throughout their reporting process. What’s the value of a human journalist, anyway?

news.title: ‘She’s Never Going to Age’: Porn Stars Are Embracing AI Clones to Stay Forever Young
news.description: AI companion platforms like OhChat and SinfulX are offering adult creators digital twins, who are always at their peak and stay monetizing.

news.title: There’s Something Very Dark About a Lot of Those Viral AI Fruit Videos
news.description: With female AI fruit being fart-shamed and even sexually assaulted, there’s a misogynistic undercurrent to the fruit slop microdramas, even as they appear to be cultivating genuine fans.
